name: DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru
address: 01-02 Menara Landmark, No. 12, Jalan Ngee Heng, Ibrahim International Business Di, Trung tâm TP. Johor Bahru, Johor Bahru, Malaysia
description:
Khám Phá Sự Sang Trọng Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

Nằm ngay trung tâm thành phố Johor Bahru, chỉ cách trung tâm 0,5 km, DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru là điểm đến lý tưởng cho những du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp và sự sôi động của thành phố này. Khách sạn được xây dựng từ năm 2014, mang đến không gian hiện đại, tiện nghi và đẳng cấp, phù hợp cho cả chuyến công tác lẫn kỳ nghỉ gia đình. Chỉ mất khoảng 28 phút di chuyển từ sân bay, du khách có thể dễ dàng đến và bắt đầu hành trình khám phá của mình một cách thuận tiện.

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru còn nổi bật với chính sách thân thiện dành cho gia đình, cho phép trẻ em từ 1 đến 17 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí khi đi cùng người lớn. Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 15:00, và khách hàng cần trả phòng trước 12:00 trưa để đảm bảo trải nghiệm thoải mái và thuận tiện. Với các tiện nghi cao cấp và vị trí đắc địa, khách sạn hứa hẹn mang đến những trải nghiệm khó quên cho mọi khách lưu trú.

Sự giải trí tuyệt vời tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru tọa lạc tại Johor Bahru, Malaysia, là một khách sạn đẳng cấp với các tiện nghi giải trí tuyệt vời. Khách sạn có một quầy bar sang trọng, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức những ly cocktail độc đáo và hòa mình vào không khí vui tươi. Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và tận hưởng những trải nghiệm thư giãn, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ massage chuyên nghiệp, bồn tắm nước nóng, phòng xông hơi và spa cao cấp. Bạn cũng có thể tận hưởng không gian chung với khu vực tiếp khách và TV để thư giãn và trò chuyện với bạn bè và gia đình.

Tiện Nghi Thể Thao Hiện Đại Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru, du khách có cơ hội duy trì phong cách sống năng động và khỏe mạnh nhờ vào trung tâm thể hình hiện đại và rộng rãi. Trung tâm fitness được trang bị đầy đủ các thiết bị tập luyện cao cấp, từ máy chạy bộ, xe đạp tập đến các thiết bị tập thể hình đa dạng, giúp bạn dễ dàng thực hiện các bài tập yêu thích bất cứ lúc nào trong ngày. Không gian thoáng đãng, sạch sẽ cùng đội ngũ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ, đảm bảo mang đến trải nghiệm tập luyện an toàn và hiệu quả. Dù bạn là người mới bắt đầu hay vận động viên chuyên nghiệp, trung tâm thể hình tại khách sạn sẽ là nơi lý tưởng để duy trì thói quen tập luyện của bạn trong suốt kỳ nghỉ.

Tiện Nghi Tiện Lợi Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru, khách hàng sẽ được trải nghiệm các dịch vụ tiện ích đa dạng nhằm mang lại sự thoải mái và thuận tiện tối đa trong suốt kỳ nghỉ hoặc chuyến công tác. Dịch vụ giặt là chuyên nghiệp giúp bạn luôn giữ gìn trang phục sạch sẽ, trong khi dịch vụ phòng 24/7 mang lại sự tiện lợi cho những nhu cầu ăn uống hoặc nghỉ ngơi ngay tại phòng của bạn. Đặc biệt, khách còn có thể sử dụng két an toàn để bảo vệ tài sản cá nhân cùng dịch vụ hỗ trợ từ đội ngũ lễ tân tận tình qua dịch vụ concierge, giúp bạn dễ dàng đặt tour hoặc giải đáp mọi thắc mắc.

Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp Wi-Fi miễn phí tại các khu vực công cộng, giúp bạn luôn kết nối dễ dàng. Dịch vụ lưu trữ hành lý an toàn và dọn phòng hàng ngày đảm bảo không gian nghỉ ngơi của bạn luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng. Với các tiện ích này, DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru cam kết mang đến cho khách hàng trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tiện nghi, thoải mái và an tâm tuyệt đối trong suốt thời gian lưu trú.

Tiện Nghi Giao Thông Đẳng Cấp Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru, khách hàng sẽ được trải nghiệm dịch vụ đỗ xe tiện lợi và an toàn với hệ thống valet parking chuyên nghiệp, giúp bạn tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức khi đến khách sạn. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ shuttle miễn phí để di chuyển dễ dàng đến các điểm đến quan trọng trong khu vực, mang lại sự thuận tiện tối đa cho chuyến đi của bạn. Đặc biệt, khách có thể thuê xe riêng để khám phá Johor Bahru theo ý thích, hoặc tận hưởng không gian rộng rãi của bãi đỗ xe trong khuôn viên khách sạn hoàn toàn miễn phí, giúp bạn yên tâm về phương tiện di chuyển suốt kỳ nghỉ.

Tiện Nghi Phòng Nghỉ Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru, mỗi phòng nghỉ được trang bị đầy đủ các tiện nghi cao cấp nhằm mang đến sự thoải mái tối đa cho khách hàng. Du khách sẽ tận hưởng cảm giác thư giãn tuyệt đối với bộ đồ tắm và áo choàng tắm sang trọng, cùng với máy sấy tóc tiện lợi để chăm sóc ngoại hình sau một ngày dài khám phá thành phố. Mỗi phòng còn có truyền hình hiện đại giúp bạn thỏa mãn sở thích giải trí ngay tại chỗ, bên cạnh đó là tủ lạnh và minibar đầy ắp đồ uống và đồ ăn nhẹ để bạn dễ dàng thưởng thức bất cứ khi nào muốn.

Không gian phòng còn nổi bật với ban công hoặc sân thượng riêng, tạo điều kiện lý tưởng để thưởng ngoạn cảnh đẹp xung quanh. Các tiện nghi khác như phòng khách riêng biệt, bộ dụng cụ vệ sinh cá nhân cao cấp, cùng rèm chắn sáng giúp khách hàng có giấc ngủ ngon và yên tĩnh. Ngoài ra, khách còn được phục vụ trà miễn phí, mang lại cảm giác ấm cúng và thân thiện, giúp bạn cảm thấy như đang ở nhà trong suốt kỳ lưu trú tại khách sạn.

Trải Nghiệm Ẩm Thực Đẳng Cấp tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru, du khách sẽ được thưởng thức những món ăn ngon miệng tại nhà hàng sang trọng của khách sạn, nơi mang đến các món ăn đa dạng phù hợp với mọi khẩu vị. Bên cạnh đó, dịch vụ phòng 24/7 giúp quý khách có thể thưởng thức bữa ăn yêu thích ngay tại phòng riêng, mang lại sự tiện nghi và thoải mái tối đa trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Mỗi ngày, đội ngũ nhân viên dọn phòng sẽ đảm bảo căn phòng của bạn luôn sạch sẽ, gọn gàng, tạo điều kiện lý tưởng để thư giãn sau những ngày khám phá thành phố. Đặc biệt, buổi sáng tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru bắt đầu với buffet sáng phong phú, cung cấp các món ăn tươi ngon, đa dạng từ các món truyền thống đến hiện đại, giúp khách hàng bắt đầu ngày mới tràn đầy năng lượng.

Trải Nghiệm Đa Dạng Các Loại Phòng tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

Tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru, du khách có nhiều lựa chọn phòng phù hợp với nhu cầu và sở thích của mình. Các loại phòng như Phòng Twin Executive với quyền truy cập Lounge, Phòng Twin Deluxe Cao Cấp trên tầng cao, và các phòng King như King Deluxe, King Executive, hay King Guest đều mang đến không gian rộng rãi 31 mét vuông, lý tưởng để thư giãn sau một ngày dài khám phá thành phố. Ngoài ra, các phòng cao cấp hơn như King One Bedroom Suite, Presidential Suite hay Two Bedroom Deluxe Family Suite cung cấp không gian từ 52 đến 156 mét vuông, phù hợp cho các gia đình hoặc nhóm bạn đông người, mang lại trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp và tiện nghi tối đa.

Khi đặt phòng qua Agoda, bạn sẽ nhận được giá tốt nhất cùng quy trình đặt phòng đơn giản, nhanh chóng và không gây phiền hà. Điều này giúp bạn dễ dàng chọn lựa và chuẩn bị cho chuyến đi của mình mà không cần lo lắng về thủ tục hay chi phí. Hãy để Agoda giúp bạn có những trải nghiệm tuyệt vời tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru với mức giá hợp lý và dịch vụ thuận tiện nhất!

Trung tâm TP. Johor Bahru - Nơi hội tụ của văn hóa và giải trí

Trung tâm TP. Johor Bahru tọa lạc tại trái tim của Johor Bahru, Malaysia, là một điểm đến hấp dẫn cho du khách muốn khám phá văn hóa độc đáo và trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời. Với vị trí thuận lợi, khu vực này có nhiều điểm tham quan và hoạt động thú vị.

Du khách có thể khám phá các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng như Cung điện Sultan Abu Bakar, một công trình kiến trúc độc đáo với lối kiến trúc pha trộn giữa phong cách Melayu và Victoria. Ngoài ra, khu vực này còn có Bảo tàng Hoàng gia Johor, nơi trưng bày các hiện vật về lịch sử và văn hóa của Johor Bahru.

Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng những trải nghiệm giải trí, Trung tâm TP. Johor Bahru cũng có nhiều cửa hàng mua sắm, nhà hàng và quán bar. Du khách có thể thưởng thức những món ăn đặc sản độc đáo và tham gia vào cuộc sống về đêm sôi động của thành phố. Với sự kết hợp hài hòa giữa văn hóa và giải trí, Trung tâm TP. Johor Bahru là một điểm đến không thể bỏ qua khi đến Johor Bahru, Malaysia.

Cách di chuyển từ sân bay gần Johor Bahru đến DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru là một khách sạn sang trọng nằm ở trung tâm TP. Johor Bahru, Malaysia. Để đến khách sạn này từ sân bay gần nhất, có một số phương tiện di chuyển bạn có thể lựa chọn.

Nếu bạn đến từ Sân bay Quốc tế Changi Singapore, bạn có thể di chuyển bằng taxi hoặc xe đò từ sân bay đến Trạm Woodlands Checkpoint. Tại đây, bạn có thể đi bộ qua biên giới và chuyển sang xe taxi hoặc Grab để đến DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru. Quãng đường từ sân bay Changi đến khách sạn khoảng 30 km và mất khoảng 1 giờ di chuyển.

Nếu bạn đến từ Sân bay Quốc tế Senai Johor, bạn có thể di chuyển bằng taxi hoặc xe đò từ sân bay đến DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru. Quãng đường từ sân bay Senai đến khách sạn khoảng 30 km và mất khoảng 30 phút di chuyển. DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón từ sân bay, vì vậy bạn có thể liên hệ với khách sạn trước để sắp xếp.

Khám phá những điểm tham quan xung quanh DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru nằm gần nhiều điểm tham quan nổi tiếng, đảm bảo mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm thú vị tại Johor Bahru. Các điểm đến nổi tiếng như Angry Birds Activity Park, Johor Zoo và Đền Arulmigu Sri Rajakaliamman chỉ cách khách sạn trong khoảng cách đi bộ ngắn, rất thuận tiện cho việc khám phá.

Nếu bạn muốn tìm hiểu về lịch sử và văn hóa địa phương, bạn có thể dạo quanh Jalan Wong Al Fook, Johor Old Chinese Temple và Tan Hiok Nee heritage Street. Những con đường này đẹp mắt và đậm chất truyền thống, mang đến cho bạn cảm giác như đang trở về quá khứ. Bên cạnh đó, Bảo tàng Di sản Trung Quốc cũng là một điểm đến thú vị để khám phá.

Nếu bạn muốn thư giãn và tận hưởng không gian xanh mát, Hutan Bandar Recreational Park là lựa chọn lý tưởng. Đây là một công viên rộng lớn với nhiều tiện ích như đường đi bộ, khu vui chơi trẻ em và khu vực picnic. Cuối cùng, bạn cũng có thể ghé thăm State Secretariat Building, một công trình kiến trúc đẹp mắt và có ý nghĩa lịch sử. Tất cả những điểm tham quan này đều nằm gần DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru, giúp bạn khám phá và tận hưởng Johor Bahru một cách tuyệt vời.

Vị trí thuận lợi gần các trạm giao thông công cộng tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru nằm ở vị trí lý tưởng gần các trạm giao thông công cộng quan trọng. Khách sạn chỉ cách Bến xe Sentral Kotaraya và Nhà ga JB Sentral chỉ vài bước chân. Điều này rất thuận tiện cho du khách muốn khám phá thành phố và các điểm tham quan xung quanh. Bên cạnh đó, Bến xe Perling và Trạm tàu Johor Bahru Sentral cũng nằm gần khách sạn, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi cho du khách muốn khám phá xa hơn.

Nhà hàng xung quanh DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng đáng chú ý. Khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại LAZY MONDAY HQ, Zaituna Restaurant và ZZ Sup Tulang Restaurant. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức ẩm thực địa phương, hãy đến Kampung Bahru, Johor, nơi bạn có thể tìm thấy những món ăn đặc trưng của vùng đất này. Nếu bạn là người yêu thích thịt bò, hãy đến Awagyu Restaurant, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn ngon từ thịt bò tươi ngon. Ngoài ra, còn có các nhà hàng khác như Big Food F&B, Kam Long Ah Zai Curry Fish Head, Modern Fishing Restaurant (Nasi Goreng Seafood Stulang), Restoran Woon Kiang và Restoran Hua Mui để bạn khám phá và tận hưởng ẩm thực đa dạng tại Johor Bahru.

Những điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng gần DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru có vị trí thuận lợi gần nhiều điểm mua sắm nổi tiếng. Khách sạn nằm gần Plaza Kotaraya Shopping Mall, Galleria tại Kotaraya và Miss Ireen Hand . Vintage . Ethnic, nơi bạn có thể tìm thấy những món đồ thời trang độc đáo và độc lạ. Nếu bạn muốn khám phá thêm các cửa hàng và trung tâm mua sắm, Trung tâm thương mại Pelangi, Ayu Best Buy Shop và Popular Book Store cũng nằm gần đó. Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể tìm thấy nhiều cửa hàng và siêu thị bán lẻ tại Khu mua sắm Danga City, Plaza Seni Shopping Mall và Khu mua sắm và siêu thị bán lẻ ZON. Nếu bạn muốn trải nghiệm mua sắm đa dạng và tiện lợi, JB City Square cũng chỉ cách khách sạn một quãng đi bộ ngắn.

Giá trung bình một phòng tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru là một khách sạn sang trọng và đẳng cấp tọa lạc tại Johor Bahru, Malaysia. Với giá trung bình một phòng là 97 đô la, khách sạn này đem đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời với dịch vụ chất lượng cao và tiện nghi hiện đại. So với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại Johor Bahru là 55 đô la, DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru mang lại sự sang trọng và đẳng cấp vượt trội với mức giá hợp lý. Với vị trí thuận lợi, khách sạn này là lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho du khách muốn khám phá thành phố Johor Bahru mà không cần lo lắng về giá cả.

Dịch vụ tuyệt vời và nhân viên thân thiện tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru được đánh giá cao bởi những du khách vì dịch vụ tuyệt vời và nhân viên thân thiện. Nhân viên tại đây rất thân thiện và hữu ích, phòng cũng được giữ gìn sạch sẽ và đẹp đẽ. Vị trí của khách sạn rất tuyệt vời, sạch sẽ và dịch vụ tốt! Khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao dịch vụ khách hàng xuất sắc, phòng được bảo quản rất tốt và vị trí rất tốt. Phòng sạch sẽ, nhân viên thân thiện. Vị trí tốt và các tiện nghi của khách sạn rất tốt. Nhân viên khách sạn thân thiện và phòng rất sạch sẽ và được giữ gìn tốt. Phòng cực kỳ sạch sẽ và có view đẹp.

Đánh giá tích cực về DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru

DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru là một khách sạn tuyệt vời với những đánh giá tích cực từ khách hàng. Với tổng điểm 8.9, khách sạn này không chỉ được đánh giá cao về giá trị (8.7) và tiện nghi (8.9), mà còn đạt điểm cao về sự sạch sẽ (9.2), sự thoải mái (8.9) và hiệu suất của nhân viên (9.1).

Với mức điểm 8.7 cho vị trí, DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru nằm ở vị trí thuận lợi để khám phá Johor Bahru, Malaysia. Khách sạn chỉ cách các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng như Hòn đảo Rawa và Công viên Temenggong Ibrahim một quãng đi bộ ngắn. Khách hàng đánh giá cao vị trí này, cho phép họ dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan và trung tâm thành phố.

Khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao sự chuyên nghiệp của nhân viên tại khách sạn. Với điểm 9.1 cho hiệu suất của nhân viên, DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru đảm bảo mang đến cho khách hàng dịch vụ tốt nhất. Nhân viên thân thiện và chu đáo, luôn sẵn lòng giúp đỡ và đáp ứng mọi yêu cầu của khách hàng, tạo ra một trải nghiệm đáng nhớ cho du khách.

sample_comments.text: Chỗ ở rất thoải mái, mát mẻ và sạch sẽ. Tôi ở một mình nhưng không gian đủ rộng để hai người sử dụng. Có ít tiếng ồn nên tôi có thể ngủ ngon được. Trong hai ngày, tôi cũng đã ăn sáng, có cả món phương Tây, Ấn Độ, Trung Quốc và nhiều loại khác rất đa dạng. Cũng rất gần JB Square, thuận tiện để ăn tối hay đi mua sắm.
sample_comments.title: Đây là một chuyến đi tuyệt vời trong 2 đêm 3 ngày.
Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was not to the mark

sample_comments.text:
Phòng đơn giản nhưng lại gọn gàng, sạch sẽ và có cảm giác dễ chịu. Điểm đặc biệt là sự đa dạng của bữa sáng thật tuyệt vời và hương vị cũng rất ngon. Đặc sản địa phương rất đáng yêu, ngay cả tôi, người đã từng du lịch đến nhiều quốc gia, cũng hài lòng. Những đứa trẻ chưa quen với việc ăn ngoài ở Đông Nam Á có thể yên tâm thử nghiệm nhiều món ăn địa phương và chúng cũng rất thích thú. Nhờ đó, tôi đã trở thành người yêu thích ẩm thực Ấn Độ và Hồi giáo mà đặc biệt là ở Malaysia. Món ăn kiểu lục địa cũng phong phú và món tráng miệng cũng rất hài lòng. Có tới 5 loại mật ong địa phương và những loại siro từ thực vật địa phương, thật sự thú vị và đã giúp tôi có thêm lý do để quay lại Malaysia. Tôi cũng rất vui vì đã được thưởng thức trà sữa nổi tiếng không phải trong cốc đơn giản của khách sạn mà trong cốc địa phương có hoa văn.

Trong chuyến đi Singapore, tôi đã chọn nơi này để tiết kiệm chi phí, nhưng đi xe buýt rất dễ dàng, đồ lưu niệm và bữa ăn đều rẻ, quả thật đã chọn đúng. Mặc dù hơi xa bến xe buýt nhưng giá taxi cũng rẻ nên tôi hoàn toàn không thấy phiền. Tôi nghĩ tôi sẽ quay lại ở đây một lần nữa.
sample_comments.title: Bữa sáng thật vui vẻ.
I had a very comfortable stay.
sample_comments.negatives: The fact that there were constructions going on around the hotel area

sample_comments.text: Lần này tôi đã đặt phòng có thể sử dụng phòng chờ. Về mặt địa lý, từ JB Central cũng có thể đi bộ đến đó, và cũng gần các tiệm bánh chuối, đền kính, chợ đêm và tòa nhà chính quyền cũ, rất tiện cho việc tham quan. Masjid Abubakar nếu cố gắng cũng có thể đi bộ nhưng vì có dốc nên đi xe sẽ tốt hơn. Việc có thể sử dụng phòng chờ thật sự rất tiện lợi. Dù không có bữa sáng nhưng có thể ăn bữa sáng kiểu lục địa ở phòng chờ, và từ 17:30 đến 19:00 cũng có rượu được phục vụ. Chúng tôi đã đặt bữa tối riêng nên chỉ uống bia và ăn nhẹ, nhưng nhiều người cũng ăn uống ở phòng chờ như bữa tối thay thế. Ngoài ra, có cả bồn jacuzzi cũng rất tốt. Tôi chỉ đi một lần nhưng vợ tôi đã đi hai lần vào ngày đến và ngày đi. Nhân viên rất thân thiện, dù chúng tôi đến trước 10 giờ sáng nhưng họ vẫn kiểm tra cho chúng tôi, dẫn chúng tôi vào phòng chờ, nên chúng tôi có thể gửi hành lý và uống cà phê trước khi ra ngoài thị trấn. Khi đang đi bộ, họ đã gọi điện thông báo rằng phòng đã sẵn sàng và họ cũng đã để hành lý chúng tôi vào phòng.
sample_comments.title: Đây là một khách sạn tốt mặc dù có hơi đắt một chút.

sample_comments.title: GREAT stay in JB
sample_comments.positives: Our room was gorgeous. It was incredibly spacious. In fact, they gave us a one bedroom suite which was unexpected. it was also a corner room on a high floor with a lovely view in multiple directions. The buffet breakfast is also extensive, with a huge array of options, and quite delicious. I would highly recommend the DoubleTree for your stay in JB!

sample_comments.text:
Tôi đã ở tại DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru trong một chuyến công tác ngắn và có một trải nghiệm rất thoải mái. Khách sạn được đặt ở trung tâm thành phố, tạo sự thuận tiện cho các cuộc họp kinh doanh và di chuyển quanh Johor Bahru. Nó cũng tương đối gần với CIQ và các khu thương mại chính.

Căn phòng rộng rãi, sạch sẽ và được bảo trì tốt. Bàn làm việc và ánh sáng phù hợp để hoàn thành một số công việc vào buổi tối, và kết nối Wi-Fi ổn định trong suốt thời gian tôi ở đây. Chiếc giường rất thoải mái, giúp tôi nghỉ ngơi tốt sau một ngày dài họp.

Dịch vụ từ nhân viên chuyên nghiệp và hiệu quả. Thủ tục nhận và trả phòng diễn ra suôn sẻ, và đội ngũ nhân viên lịch sự và sẵn sàng giúp đỡ khi cần. Chiếc bánh quy ấm nổi tiếng của DoubleTree khi nhận phòng là một điểm nhấn thú vị.

Bữa sáng có nhiều lựa chọn về các món ăn địa phương và quốc tế, rất tuyệt vời trước khi ra ngoài làm việc. Các tiện nghi chung, bao gồm phòng gym và khu vực tiếp khách, được bảo trì tốt.

Tổng thể, DoubleTree by Hilton Johor Bahru là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho các doanh nhân tìm kiếm sự thoải mái, dịch vụ tốt và vị trí chiến lược. Tôi chắc chắn sẽ xem xét ở đây một lần nữa cho các chuyến công tác trong tương lai.
sample_comments.title: Kỳ nghỉ kinh doanh tuyệt vời tại Johor Bahru

sample_comments.title: Not a good experience
sample_comments.text:
I would rate my experience as 3 out of 5, and below are the reasons for my dissatisfaction:

1. The air conditioning in our room (1907) was not working properly, making our stay uncomfortable.
2. The WiFi connection was very poor, forcing me to use my roaming data to access the internet.
3. I ordered food from the Makan Kitchen and waited for over 40 minutes. Despite following up with three different waitresses, I received the same response each time - that the food was still being prepared. Frustrated, I left the restaurant and had to purchase food from a nearby mart. I must acknowledge the kind gesture of the staff member who followed up with us and offered complimentary food.
4. I booked a king guest room for two adults and one child via Agoda. However, upon arrival, the receptionist at the Makan Restaurant insisted that only two adults were entitled to complimentary breakfast per room
5. I informed the hotel via email that we were celebrating my son's birthday on April 6th and our anniversary on the 7th. Despite this, I had to make multiple phone calls to ensure at least a simple decoration for my son's birthday.
6. Coleen and Farah contacted me regarding my feedback, attempting to dismiss it without first understanding the details and verifying with the third-party app whether my concern was valid. Very insensible people. A waste of time speaking to them

sample_comments.title: BED BUGS AND TERRIBLE SERVICE
sample_comments.text:
The Doubletree by Hilton was a truly terrible place to stay. Our room had bed bugs. It was awful. One night we came back and both of our keys didn't unlock the room door, we called to the lobby down stairs from the phone on our floor and were told to come down to the lobby. I asked if someone could come up as we had a lot of shopping bags. We waited 25 mins and no one came, so I went down to the lobby and the staff were extremely rude and unapologetic.
The only nice thing about this hotel is the buffet and the chef Carlos.

sample_comments.title: Hotel was good but service could improve.
sample_comments.text: Told them I was coming for my birthday celebration. Deco in wrong room. The buffet breakfast see staff not being able to handle he Hugh group. Service could improve to o sustain as 5 star.

sample_comments.title: Disappointment!
sample_comments.text: Choose this hotel for anniversary celebration turn out to be what a turn off. We stay here because we choose to staycay and have buffet dinner which is convenient for us but from the hotel itself and the dinner really not worth the money spent. The dinner me and my bf trying to eat most of the cuisine but we only had one bite and food doesn't taste good, cold western choice and nothing to eat basically. Came in only for 30min then left to find other delivery food. Check out, we were asking for smoking room but they mentioned don't have any so we stayed and we understand we signed the policy of non smoking, we choose to vape instead since the smoking area is too far. Didn't have any signage saying no vaping since malaysia vape is legal, but upon checkout manager and staff the room smell smoke and cannot sell the room which is we did not, no proof or anything or signage for no vape allowed still asking to pay the penalty charges. Such a bad experience will never return again even for any of the food choice or the room.!!

sample_comments.title: My credit card suspect compromised in this hotel

Then, my kid ate the chipsmore and nuts, we already paid during check out, but then they email to us that they want to charge what we ate in the room in my credit card! even worse, when i emailed them the receipt proof of the purchase, they DID NOT APOLOGIZE to us for accusing us not paying for the food, and said the person in charge was not around (what a lousy excuse!). I am deeply hurt and disappointed with this supposedly 5 star hotel. I'll not staying/eat at this hotel ever again.

sample_comments.title: not worth the $
sample_comments.text: No free wifi, no free parking. All must pay. Isn't that part of the service of booking such an expensive hotel? Parking is 10RM per day, has to be validated when you exit the hotel. So we have to go up and down, in and out just for that 10RM. Shouldn't the hotel absorb such little costs for such a hassle? Sofa isn't clean in the rooms, leftover crumbs all over the floor and sofa. So grand on the outside but badly done on the inside. Breakfast has a wide variety, but food is not worth the $ spent. Service by the staff at the restaurant made it worst. So many of them walking around blindly doing subpar work. Tried to order a latte with our table of 5, "Hi, can we have 1 latte and......" & she ran off, we haven't even finished our order. Isn't it obvious there's 5 of us? Ridiculous! Terrible! NEVER back again.

sample_comments.title: Nightmare experience with lack of basic necessities & renovating pool
sample_comments.text:
The pool was the highlight for us and we had no idea it was under renovation from Agoda. Our disappointment was as big as the hole in the ground that greeted us. 

But it's ok we let it slide since they were apologetic and wasn't their fault. 

But no it gets worse. 

Room given was pretty dated. But again, it's ok - so long as it's clean right? 

It gets even worse. 

To female travellers, be sure to remember your period supplies because there are no pads available in this entire 4 star hotel. Cue 3am and I had my period. Called staff , asked for a sanitary pad and got a sanitary BAG because surprise surprise - no pads at all. 

Ok never mind. I'll call for a GrabMart. When Grab driver arrived, he was told they're not allowed to deliver to the counter and I had to physically come down myself to collect. 

Very disappointing stay - so what's the difference between this hotel and an Airbnb? At least an Airbnb would have more accessible location with 24h marts instead. I know where I'd be booking the next time.

sample_comments.title: Worst hotel experience in my life
sample_comments.text:
Something was very wrong with the aircon. Default setting at 17deg c when check-in. I set to 25deg c at 12mid night and went to bed but it got colder with cold air blown on my face from the aircon. At 1.45am I called the front desk and they sent an aircon engineer who opened the aircon vent and tightened some screws. Adjusted the temperature to 30deg c and the engineer left at 2am. But the aircon continued to blow cold air till about 4am when the temp normalised. Slept only 2 hours due to the aircon problem.
The room is very old. The noisy opening of the hotel room door is due to old door hinges, poorly maintained. It was deafening and annoying when I open it in the dead of the night.
The water from the shower is lukewarm but not hot enough. Same issue in the other room occupied by my family members. My sense is that the hotel maintenance is far below standard.
My first stay in a Hilton hotel. Deeply disappointed. Indeed my worst hotel stay in my life.

sample_comments.title: Not Worth It

However there is always exception to the rule. Karen from Reception was very friendly and helpful. She has a cheerful disposition and always have a ready smile. If I can find a reason for checking into the hotel again in the future it has to be that Karen is still working there. Thank you Karen!

sample_comments.title: Rude staff, bed had a mouldy smell
sample_comments.text:
Staff was rude and left us at the lobby to find our way up to the executive lounge ourselves. It was our first time there so we waited for a while till a bellboy walked pass before we could get his help to tap his card in the lift for us to go up.

When we were preparing to sleep and lifted up the blankets, the bedsheet had a strong mouldy smell. Requested for a change of blankets but it had the same smell and we had to sleep with it. Paying so much for a bed that made me wake up with a headache - I won't recommend it. 

Nicely told the staff when we woke up, that the bed was smelly and made me wake up with a headache. She replied with a nod, and said that she will let the cleaners know. No apologies as well. 

Not coming back, my anniversary trip with my husband was ruined.

sample_comments.title: Real bad experience
sample_comments.text: Our stay was horrible as check in time was 3:00pm,we got there at 5:30pm and room was not ready then they gave us RM 60 voucher for snacks .The snacks we ordered came only after 1 hour and soup was Luke warm and butter was frozen and their bread was baked at least few weeks old.After that they told that the room which we booked is not available so change to another room but offer an extra bed .We were tired so requested to send the bed immediately but after 4 reminders bed came in 3 hours time.Then suddenly they decided to punish us by increasing the temperature I. Our room by 10:00pm air conditioning was at 24 degrees.We went down and made noise after that in 30 minutes temperature cane to 19 degrees.I strongly recommend not to stay there .only good thing that hotel was beautiful and bathrooms were modern and nice looking but staff was untrained,food was lousy.We had our worst hotel experience with this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Disappointed to Double Tree by Hilton Hotel
sample_comments.text:
When we arrived the hotel and check-in, front desk was amaze me due to the staff pass us the cookie and it is hot from oven, we are so surprise that the staff just pick it up from the front desk, but normally cookie is come with coffee or tea, maybe my expectation is too high, it wasn't come with coffee or tea, I still remember when I check in G Hotel, there is a coffee machine next to it, and also served cool fruit punch when arrival. So how do you expect your guest eat cookie without drink ? doesn't make sense right.
So I told my wife, don't worry, we bring up to the room first, there should be a coffee machine in the room (b'cos G-Hotel has), it is another disappointment to us again, there is no coffee machine and the mini fridge is empty, some more the front desk was collected RM150 deposit, what is the purpose of having a fridge without anything inside ? so funny, must well you remove the fridge ? Finally we drink Nescafe and don't know what "Raintree" English breakfast tea bag at 25 teabag -RM9.00, can you imagine a 4 stars hotel give so cheap brand tea bag ? 
Another funny thing in this hotel is the parking charges is not free, it is RM10 each day. This is my first time encounter parking fees for a hotel stay.
I meet the Operating Director of this hotel, I was so happy thought can feedback to him, but when I told him all incident and my feeling, he said this is the hotel policy, I always believe one thing, Rules is dead, human is alive, rules was set by human and can be change to serve your guest better and improve the quality of the hotel. He told me if you upgrade to suite room, you will have all these free and late check out, sorry to say, not everyone will stay in your suite room, must well you remove all standard rooms.

sample_comments.title: very bad service and attitude from your staff
sample_comments.text:
Although it was 3 am in the middle of the night, right after I got off the grab I was confronted by security on why i was there.
when to counter to enquire on my booking made and although it was my mistake for not checking the check in time, your staff was totally unprofessional with attending to me, brushing me off saying "oh not within my control you have to find some other place before you get to check in at 3 pm"
I'm fine to forego my hotel stay fee and find a place to spend the night, but your staff keeps brushing me off like I'm not a paying guest and insists that I just find another place for tonight.
I understand that she might be young and inexperienced and all decked out in carrier accessories thus the job might not be of significant importance to her.
I stated you can keep my room for other guests and I do not require a refund just assist me in finding another place for tonight since I'm not local and familiar with JB.
The response was "I'm so sorry sir you just have to search online and find yourself".
How do you think i manage to book my stay at Hilton? if i was able to find an available room would i even bother asking for assistance?
Please re-evaluate your standards for the front desk, these are the people with whom your clients will be in contact and interact from the very start of their experience at your hotel and also when they leave.
I am not trying to educate you on how you should manage your staff but just my honest feedback.

sample_comments.title: Service Horrible
sample_comments.text: The hotel was large and had many rooms available. I stay one night for business trip and the staff arranged connecting room for me with some else. It's so noisy!!! I feadback to the staff they not even want to change the room for me or apologize!!!!

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: COUNTDOWN DINNER TASTED HORRIBLE AND LIVE BAND ZERO NEW YEAR MOOD

sample_comments.title: Weekend getaway
sample_comments.text:
Have you heard before 9:30 am room cleaning from housekeeping staff. That's what i got . Ask to come later, ended the rook wasn't cleaned for my 2 nights.
Operator or front office are so short staff, no one pick up the call. 
However welcoming staff at front office are friendly and we are given cookies .
Car parking is free, strong wifi and many channels on TV. 8 mins walk to jbcc.

sample_comments.title: Bedroom stinks
sample_comments.text:
Stay for a night for business trip. Check in and told that dont want a corner room, yet assign a corner room. When back to reception and she change another room for me. 2nd room once open , it stinks, and we called operator. She asked us to wait in the room and will send someone for room investigation. I told her I am in hurry for another dinner appointment, request to chance room and suddenly the line gone quiet without saying advising that she will put me on hold or what.
Then another men pick up and told us to go down to reception. When we down to reception and non of the staff was got told that what we have been through. 
Lousy communication. Suppose room will be checked before they sell the room. 
I been carrying all my lugguage up and down for many rounds. 
Very disappointed with the services.

sample_comments.title: Location - traffic challenge
sample_comments.text: Location is a bit in convenient for me

sample_comments.title: Too expensive
sample_comments.text: Wifi was down (was not informed until I asked) and they put a baby cot in our room, it was only removed a few hours later after multiple reminders, counter staff is not helpful also, will never stay there again as there are many other hotels will lower prices and better service

sample_comments.title: Overrated Hilton Group Hotel with overpriced stay and nothing to look fot
sample_comments.text:
1. First night - electricity was out, poor response, only after 4th call then room was changed
2. Shower amenities fallen off, not properly maintained
3. Facilities - sauna room not operating; swimming pool has to book but when i booked everyone was allowed to come in without booking, lousy system. Swimming pool also have its drainage plastic fallen here and there, too cold, nothing special abt the facilities here;
4. Not worth the price paid at all
5. Basement parking is limited; due to events, full by 10 pm, and had to go to the menara parking - still not convenient
6. Not much restaurants and shops, better stay at hotel near mall, nothing good abt this hotel considering the price paid
7. Pls look for better jb city centre hotel

sample_comments.title: Pillow unavailable
sample_comments.text: Stayed there the second time but the pillows were incredibly flat when called for a thicker one they were out of stock.

sample_comments.title: Not worth it
sample_comments.text:
As one of the few 5 star hotel in JB, Hilton does not live up to their brand expectation. 
Service was bad (I was served by the duty manager), my booking was missing, follow-up is horrible, restaurant and bar service is filled with hiccups as well due to bad communication. Only the room was good that's it. If I just want good rooms and bad service, any other new 4/5 star hotel in JB would do just fine.

Grab is relatively easy to get around JB now a days, and not super pricey. It is alright to book other hotels that has better surroundings, albeit further away from city centre, it is still easy to access with grab.

sample_comments.title: Worst 4 star hotel Ihave ever stayed
sample_comments.text: No Astro for World cup. Only have TV1 & 2.. No complimentary car park and need pay RM10 per day. Small swimming pool and all facilities closed at 8pm. Overall is terrible !!!

sample_comments.title: Very disappointed experience
sample_comments.text: Plan to celebrate my birthday on last Friday and turn up to be an angry day for me. Am very upset with the service that really piss me off on my day. Was told that we have no free wifi as we book through agoda and it is only free for Hilton member. Recall that we do enjoy free wifi few months back hence we wanted to know why not this time round. The staff cant explain it and just tell me about the executive lounge access which puzzle me as we are not entitled and not related to what i have asked her. After asking her again she get help from her senior to explain to us and took back the executive lounge entitlement. Was rather confuse and i think in the 1st place you should honor your customer what you have offered and not to take it back especially in such a situation. Was very disappointed with this service in a 5 star hotel like hilton. A basic happy birthday wishes can also be miss. I went staycation every year and this is the only hotel that will miss such a basic wishes.

sample_comments.title: good
sample_comments.text: good

sample_comments.title: Disgusting breakfast & poor front desk staff
sample_comments.text: We enjoyed the rooms. The front desk staff was cold and haughty. The breakfast was the worst I have ever eaten in JB, lousy variety I rem seeing fishcake and fishballs. the size of the omelette was small! The fruits were the only things that was fresh. I don't think I'll come to this hotel ever again. Too expensive. Not near any shopping area.

sample_comments.title: Sharing my bad experience in Level 13 restaurant
sample_comments.text:
Overall, we enjoyed our stay. The room and hotel service were very good. However, our experience at the Level 13 Italian restaurant was not good and affected our stay.

During dinner, we asked the waiter about the steak portion and wine recommendation. As first-time guests, this is normal for us. The waiter checked a few times and then brought the manager.

When we asked for wine advice, the manager asked about our budget and grade in a way that felt uncomfortable. His tone and facial expression made us feel not welcome.

We already saw the prices on the menu. We were only asking for a simple recommendation. We expected a more friendly and professional response.

This experience was very different from the rest of the hotel service. Because of this, we will need to think carefully before choosing your hotel again.

We hope you will look into this and improve the service.

Thanks 

Thiri

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: Room has a foul musky sewage smell. They changed rooms for us but it was not worth the money we paid. The carpets throughout the rooms are dirty and has stains all over. Will not stay here again.
sample_comments.room_type: King One Bedroom Suite with Bath Tub

sample_comments.title: So so for a 4-star hotel
sample_comments.text:
We were disappointed with the following:
1. Came to try to check-in earlier around 1PM+ but staff said 1 of the 2 rooms we booked were not available but he reassured that he has already helped us check in & to await for WhatsApp message updates. We waited until 3:45PM & there were no updates, but we saw other people were getting their keys. When we tried to check in again, seemed like we weren't even checked in in the first place. Luckily we checked instead of waiting.
2. Paid RM218++/pax for the Christmas buffet. Saw there were some popular items like crayfish. However, after it was topped up for 3-4 times, the dish was replaced completely by sausages instead. It is fairly unfair for the hotel to do this, especially since charging such a high amount per pax.

Please kindly re-look into your service & restaurant standards.

sample_comments.title: Disappointed
sample_comments.text:
My stay was very disappointed due to the room condition. 

It was supposed to be a pleasant stay after a long day. After checking in, the toilet ceiling was leaking. 

I requested to change the room. After a the staff send a technician, it was then they decided to change my room. 

After changing of room, the room A/C was not working well, the fridge was faulty leading to a bad experience. 

As it was late, I decided to just sleep it off. 

Very much disappointed

sample_comments.title: Not value for money
sample_comments.text: Room is small, no drinks in the fridge, unable to rent floaty at swimming since the person in charge is not there. My room is located at the balcony so i cant see clearly the outside view. Breakfast is ok. The only thing that i like is the baby cot comes with baby pillow n blanket.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: Not very impressed with the service when we were served by the receptionist, not very friendly and he didn't give us the welcome cookies which most guests got. The room we booked smelled of cigarette smoke and we found stains on the bedsheets :( location quite ok but will not recommend for the service we received.
sample_comments.room_type: 2 Bedroom Deluxe Family Suite W/Lounge Access

sample_comments.title: Not good value
sample_comments.text: Was given a room next to the lift lobby, can hear the lifts rushing up and down. The toilet had water noises from time to time. The humming of the aircon system was loud. The location is on the fringe of the city centre. Breakfast variety was wide, but the taste is below par. Definitely not worth the room price!

sample_comments.title: Receptionist are helpful
sample_comments.text: Asked for a slice of cake. Upon checking in the staff told me that there's a simple deco has been arrange in the hotel room as requested, but turned out none. But the staff call me later to rearrange and gave some apologise token too. Thank you. Overall my family have a pleasant stay at the hotel

sample_comments.title: Quiet room is only upon request
sample_comments.text: Stayed in a room next to a lift that the loud sound woke me up in early morning 6+am and cant take a nap during day time also. Asking reception about the loud sound, only they informed that the sound was from lift. Checking with customer care line, they said we should request to have a quiet room during check-in. Then I only realized to have a quiet room is not basic here, but is only upon request!!! The hotel should ask the customer when they check-in if they are Ok with a room only has 6 hours quiet time in a day? the loud sound happened every 5 seconds from 6am-12am!! The hotel should be responsible for not assign such a room for a guest who only required good rest during hotel stay.

sample_comments.title: Hotel hygiene during pandemic
sample_comments.text: Pillow very smelly even change for 2 times. Take very seriously on this matter. Housekeeping very bad.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text:
Cons: smoking rooms have no proper ventilation. Stinks of smoke everywhere without air freshener. If you offer smoking rooms you should cater for better ventilation and cleaning. Bathroom sink was stuck even after cleaning. Needed to remind the hotel 3 times before room was finally cleaned in late afternoon.

Pros: not much considering the price charged as hotel is not in the best location. No great views. No restaurants nearby

sample_comments.title: Nothing to scream about
sample_comments.text: Not much around outside the hotel.

sample_comments.title: Breach of security, leaky baths, poor staff response
sample_comments.text: Visited the hotel on Saturday. Within 30 mins of 'chilling' in the room, 2 strangers had managed to enter our room as the check in counter had checked them into the same room. Cannot imagine not being there with all our valuables lying around; could've all been stolen. Called the front counter for help and had no prompt response and after half an hour or more we decided that there wasn't going to be a response and so proceeded to the front counters ourselves to check what happened. Front counter staff gave unsatisfactory answer to our worries and tried to 'silence' us by providing a complimentary rollaway bed which was clearly the last thing on my mind now since the room was clearly unsafe. (How easy it was for someone to have just walked into my room?) Not sure why there wasn't a manager around to help with the situation. The shower was leaking so much the entire floor was wet by the time you stepped out. Called the care line for extra towels and the response time was enough for the water to evaporate on its own. Completely ridiculous stay for a supposed highly rated hotel.

sample_comments.title: Too expensive for the service and room
sample_comments.text:
We booked the room with king size bed. Upon checking-in we were given queensize ... So we showed the Agoda voucher, and after checking with the manager, we did get the Kingsize. This room was next to the elevators and utilities room, thus extremely noisy. We requested a better room, and after two hours of playing with us (first no room was available, then only the queen size bed but without compensation for the downgrading of the room), then finally we got the room with a king size bed. 
So silly, and unnecessary.

sample_comments.title: Room Condition
sample_comments.text: Poor welcome treatment by reception staff when they discover booking was made through 3rd party agent like agoda...couldnt change room since booking was not made direct through HHonors...room that was given had a bad cigarette odours....

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Cut myself with their metal bottle. Staff didn even bother when I feedback to them.
sample_comments.negatives: Cut myself with their metal bottle. Staff didn even bother when I feedback to them.

sample_comments.text: Service was terrible

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.positives: Swimming pool area and in room dining foods
sample_comments.negatives: I always come back to this hotel, but this time I experienced a bit of discomfort with the room. It has a uncomfortable smell that I got my asthma.

sample_comments.title: Dissappointed
sample_comments.text: Im not so pleased. We checked in almost at 3pm. Only to know and informed that during check-in that check out time is at 11. First time i've heard that. upon my request at 12 noon, staff was reluctant and no effort to make guests feel welcome or pleasant staying. During check-out surprised by guests checking in at 12noon. Knowing its a Hilton group and known as one of a perstigious hotel, overall service and facilities rendered is poor.

sample_comments.title: A Mothers' Day short trip. No Celebrations visible. Sad
sample_comments.positives: Dinner - We were approached to taste the Mac & Cheese. The trolley with the melting of cheese and Trolley of Teh Tarik is something different . Keep it up! The Durian cake and the durian goreng is unique and nice. Thumbs up.
sample_comments.negatives:
Dinner - The satay was left cold so does the slices of roast meat. The clearance of plates and glasses need to be improve a lot. We have to call the staff to clear the table. The mata kucing is not fresh seem like being there for quite sometimes. (i am a mata kucing fruit lover). The Lobsters was served cold too.
Breakfast - The Nasi lemak's sambal and the sambal kupang was a dissapointment. Salty and sweet. No taste of spicyness at all "tak pedas". That kills my appetite. The Burasak was not well cooked.

The Toilet roll metallic cover kept falling down every time we use the toilet. Please do something @ room 1723

sample_comments.title: Staycation at Doubletree
sample_comments.text: My stay at the hotel was okay. The bath towels were big but there were no face towels provided. Combs, toothbrush, shaver were not provided. You have to call the "care-line" to ask for it. Maybe the hotel was budget conscious. Or maybe the hotel is aiming to get the "Best Green" award hotel. The most upset is the checkout time! It is at 11am. Any request for late checkout, you will have to pay. The check in time was @ 2pm. When I arrived at 3.15pm, my room was still not ready.

sample_comments.title: Dissatisfaction
sample_comments.text: Disappointed. We booked 6 rooms thru Agoda but when we checked in they couldn't give us rooms near each other. We reserved to celebrate our dad's 73rd bday at their buffet and we were given promises that they did not keep. When my sister misplaced her parking ticket, she was told to pay RM$50 although as guests, car park was complimentary. Also getting there was not easy as there is always a jam leading up to e hotel. Will never recommend dus hotel to frenz.

sample_comments.title: Poor
sample_comments.text: There are only few restaurants that we can choose, when we arrived there , the buffet was almost finished and it still charged us the original price, we ate only selected food and paid for RM 300 plus which we were not happy with that! And the shower area was too small which we didn't feel comfortable! We tried to call reception at midnight for servicing but there was no one answered.

sample_comments.title: room not clean properly
sample_comments.text: there are rubbish left over from previous guest not removed from the bin and there are hairs on top of the bed linen .....not something expected from Hilton ....

sample_comments.title: Holiday
sample_comments.text: Area still under construction,, valet parking security asking for rm49, quite hight compared to others, otw back to sg from KL, even kl valet rm30

sample_comments.title: Overpriced for an old hotel
sample_comments.text: Felt that my stay was just okay. The facilities on the hotel room itself are faulty. The master light (backlight on the bedframe) doesn't work even after asking the room service to repair the spoilt lights. Bathroom sink seems to be clogged and not cleaned thoroughly cos water doesn't flow through quickly. Disappointing.

sample_comments.title: Above average

Have wide spread of buffet breakfast but the foods are not nice.

Staff are quite rigid to change the room type unless you pay an amount. There is also deposit required which quite unnecessary.

sample_comments.title: Gaz and Augusta break!
sample_comments.text: We had a brilliant time..again...breakfast and executive lounge were both great and the staff..very professional! Thanks again

sample_comments.title: Good food
sample_comments.text: I enjoyed the good food here, but room was a bit squeezy if you're with kids.

sample_comments.title: Family trip
sample_comments.text: We have turned towels in dirty condition given to us on the first night. And they also ran out of their signature cookies.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Rooms doors have gaps to hallway, light from hallway visible in room, can hear people in hallway, smoke in hallway could enter room. AC thermostat not working but fixed it later at night.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
The best in cleanliness of hotel in JB. Breakfast spread was also the best 
Keep up and maintain professional.

sample_comments.title: Executive Lounge
sample_comments.text: Booked a King Executive Suite with Executive Lounge Access. This is for leisure trip. We were not allowed to dine in the Executive Lounge with our casual holidays attire in a t-shirt and shorts. We were only allowed to select the food and drinks and consumed inside our room. We do not have this issue in other hotels.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Aircon spoil n room is clustered

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: The pool is extremely dirty shows no maintenance at all. Disappointed.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
+ Loved the makan kitchen buffet dinner and the staff took the trouble to decorate our table and sang a birthday song for my husband, really appreciate the effort in making his birthday a wonderful and memorable one.

- However, the hotel room given to us had a dated interior. It also had a musky smell. The hotel towel also had a wierd unpleasant smell. Moreover, the bedding was a little dusty.

In addition to that, the hotel staff wanted to charge us for the buffet dinner again during check out, despite us paying for it the night before. They had to go through the receipts one by one to ascertain if we did, as a five star hotel, they should have a 'five star' system to keep track of the payments made by the hotel guests- this incident actually caused us unnecessary panic and distress, because we misplaced our copy of the receipt and we thought we had to pay again since there were no prove of payment made.

Double Tree Hilton was a much hospitable and pleasant hotel pre-covid era. Now I feel that the hotel's standard has dropped drastically.

sample_comments.title: Below expectation
sample_comments.text: The staff are tops in service standard. The breakfast buffet was good in variety but lacked quality. Stayed over on Sat and Sun. Was so disappointed that it was lungs rendang instead of beef rendang and for both days somemore! Not saying that the bedsheets were dirty but they did not feel fresh as expected of Hilton. So it was below expectations for me.

sample_comments.title: Poor cleanliness
sample_comments.text: When i checked in, the room has Used water bottles left and the bathroom had used shower gels left. Bed was not well made and had stain marks on the bedsheets. Not really a pleasant experience and cleanliness for a five star hotel. Though i checked in late in the evening, i was expecting the room to be ready. But as soon as i informed they changed my room, but nothing was done to delight me as a customer.

sample_comments.title: hotel room in need of maintenance
sample_comments.text: bathroom door cannot latch at all. basin tap loose with water flowing out from the side. floor tile just outside bathroom loose and shaky. bad maintenance.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: The customer service via telephone was very very rude. Instead of helping me, she have shouted and put down the phone on me. The receptionist at the hotel was helpful.

sample_comments.title: No more next time
sample_comments.text: I was very disappointed with the hotel service as not up to the 5-Stars standard. The staffs handled every single request were very bad.
sample_comments.room_type: King Accessible Guest Room W/roll In Shower

sample_comments.title: Service standard has dropped..
sample_comments.text: 2nd time staying here but this time round the room was smaller, they run out of additional bed (though it was requested upon booking). Booked a room for 3pax but there were only 2 sets of toiletries. Had to call Care Line for towels. And they came 3 times to send the towels. Staff are not very friendly. Very different from my first stay here. Good spread of food for breakfast buffet. Convenient location to Komtar, City Square & CIQ.

sample_comments.title: value for money
sample_comments.text: room is clean and spacious but staff at front desk is not helpful and unfriendly. should have to improve

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: There are stains in your sink. Yuks!!

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Staff are helpful on early check in and while waiting for room, we used the Swimming pool and the shower area was fully equipped. Room was nice and clean with nice view. Walking distance to nearest shopping need 10 mins under hot sun. Not advisable to walk in the night as some area can be dark and dangerous. No nearby eateries. Overall is a good hotel for staycation and drive out to shopping area.

sample_comments.title: No Comments
sample_comments.text: No Comments

sample_comments.title: Just checked into the hotel and extremely disappoi
Not as super as I thought
sample_comments.text: Stayed 3D/2N with my family and parents. Took 2 rooms (one bedroom suite & deluxe). Recep was sweet enough to give rooms side by side & she was friendly. Rooms were clean and expected for a 4 star hotel. As it was raining, we had to order room service however the food was so so. Could have been better. As I'm travelling with my parents, the distance to city square mall was a distance. We couldnt even get cabs. Construction near the hotel was on going making it more difficult for us to cross over as there was no traffic light and it was a busy road. We had to wait for a passenger to drop off only then we can get a cab. However the bell boys were of great help to assist as much as they can and I appreciate that. Breakfast was just average. Checking out was most a disappointment. The Recep that attended to me was just rude, unfriendly and unprofessional. As I booked through Agoda, no payment was needed however I wanted a receipt to ensure I'm charged accordingly and as a reference. She bluntly told me," U booked through Agoda right? So no receipt will be given to u".She ended her sentence and just cut me off. I only enquired as I wanted to know if I'm charged for an extra bed as I requested when doing the booking however did not receive it. Her attitude was just plain rude. I also overheard her conversation with a colleague that she needed to head to the ladies. Indeed unacceptable to speak in between when you are serving a guest. I believe the hotel needs to ensure Recep are properly trained and to be professional as that reflects the image of the hotel.
sample_comments.positives: Clean, bell boys & room service staffs were friendly.

sample_comments.title: review of hilton
sample_comments.text: As a whole its staff performance is gd.however the standards in its Tosca and Makan kitchen have dropped.

sample_comments.title: Not worth Hilton
sample_comments.text: Not worth my 120$ . Breakfast is not included. And the room is too small .
sample_comments.positives: The location is good. Staff is friendly. Lobby is nice.

sample_comments.title: A Hilton that doesn't feel like Hilton
sample_comments.text:
We got ourself a suite, which we prefer to be downgraded because the suite is really small and unsuitable for baby. The suite has a lot of wasted spaces, the bedroom is very small, the living rooom is just as small.

We have access to the executive lounge, and it was packed and stuffy with lots of small children running around. The carpets were dirty, the some of the food were empty and took a long time to refill. The juices tasted like concentrates.

We ordered room service, the Johor laksa and Nasi lemak was so bad, we had to order caesar salad and a char kway tiaw.

Overall, I think this property should not belong under the Hilton brand.
sample_comments.positives: The parking lot is superbly maintained, the Lego dragon, breakfast.

sample_comments.title: No free wifi
sample_comments.text: I felt disappointed because the counter. Said that the room I have choose is not includede free wifi, by the way, I ever been china, and free wifi was served by the hotel . It is very important , because everyone using wifi nowadays.is wifi very expensive?

sample_comments.title: stingy hotel
sample_comments.text: Inexperience receptionist. I am doing business in johor bahru and traveling around places and staying many hotels this is the only hotel which i have to pay for internet access after paying 5 star room rates . There are many hotel giving free internet access with lower room rate. Its very inconvenience to me which i have to carry my notebook to lobby to finish my work.

sample_comments.title: My bed had bed bugs.
sample_comments.text: My bed had bed bugs and i had to sleep on a bath towel. it caused lots of itch while i was trying to sleep.

sample_comments.title: Full of disappointment
sample_comments.text:
Totally a bad experience. Aircon spoil, perpetually cold, cannot adjust. The reception service was really bad upon checking in. Gave a small room when we book extra bed. Barely able to walk. When asked for a bigger room, said thats the room size for triple sharing.

After reporting to them about the aircon issue, maintenance came to service a few time, told us cannot repair.. we can request to change room. It was then they gave us a bigger room..

Breakfast was a total disappointment too. 

Lousy experience. Will not return again.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Judy,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback.

We sincerely apologise for the disappointing experience you had and truly regret that several aspects of your stay did not meet expectations. This is certainly not the impression we wish to leave with our guests.

Our team has reached out to you personally to follow up on your concerns and address the matter directly. We appreciate you bringing this to our attention.

sample_comments.text: Utensils are chargeable even though last time they would bring it up for free. This change is unpleasant

sample_comments.text: Huge cockroach found in room. Hotel offered a change of room with complimentary breakfast as service recovery. But small cockroach was still found in new room. Seems pest control is an issue in the hotel.

sample_comments.text: Many road works within the area
sample_comments.room_type: Twin Executive Room W/ Lounge Access

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Be careful @washroom. Wet floor u May just slipped and got hurt like me

sample_comments.title: Cleanliness
sample_comments.text: We had thought the standards for cleanliness would be better at Hilton so we were disappointed to see the poor maintenance. It was telling when the windows and glasses are stained. But otherwise, housekeeping staff are prompt and responsive.

sample_comments.title: Double tree need to improve on food taste and quality
sample_comments.text: Double tree need to improve on food taste and quality, the standard dropped tremendously compared to 2023. not sure what happened in the kitchen.? the rest are still standard.

sample_comments.title: Not worth it for the price
sample_comments.text: Aircon was really hot. Found it hard to sleep. They definitely need to fix that. Service was fine and amenities were ok but if you would like to sleep in a sauna, this is the best place to be. We turned the aircon to 16° and it was on full blast but the room never turn cold, all in the spirit of saving the environment. Won't book this again

sample_comments.title: Charging for cutleries
sample_comments.text: Rm5 for spare cutleries?RIDICULOUS

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text:
Been staying here for multiple times but this trip has got to be one of the worst. Our neighbours were noisy and there was constant slamming of doors very early in the morning and also as it is near the utility room, that made it noisy too. 
The lift lobby that I was on stank of poo from the day I checked in to the next day when I checked out. 

Its usually my go to hotel for a short holiday with my family but maybe its time to look for other hotels

sample_comments.title: Lost a electric toothbrush!
sample_comments.text: During my stay, I accidentally left behind my electric toothbrush in the toilet and cup. Despite contacting the hotel after departure, the hotel staff failed to locate it. Losing personal belongings is distressing, especially when staying at a reputable property. I do wish to question the integrity and honesty of the cleaner on the duty that day. Stayed in room 1621 from 22-Jun to 24-Jun 2024. Please be mindful of your things for those who wish to stay in this hotel, it has been an unpleasant and regret staying in this hotel.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: Poor value for money

sample_comments.title: 1 night stay
sample_comments.text: Check in was smooth, security was great. However, getting to the car park may be tricky. We were disappointed with the cleanliness of the bedding though. The pillow cases didn't smell fresh and clean at all, we could smell someone else's hair/ head scent the moment we lay down. Hope the housekeeping looks into it.

sample_comments.title: Not a place I use to stay
sample_comments.text: This is after covid travel, so many years had I stayed. Now, it is no longer the same. I had a family executive room. The room is spacious. Amenities are bare minimum which I can understand, going green after all. However, there are damages and also, king bedded room came without door lock. Damages to the wall by previous hotel guests are also no rectified in the other room. As this is executive room, my previous experience during check-in was done in the lounge, but not the case this time. The lounge only provides food during pre-dinner reception. No snack and limited beverages like soft drink. No longer provided bottle water for out taking. Food is quite limited. It is also pack, advice to go an hour before or reserve if you really want to have a place to sit. Lounge staff is friendly. Help a lot with cocktail. The package came with Buffet Seafood Dinner at Makan Kitchen. I don't think it is worth if it is not part of the package. Not a lot of fresh item, especially, I can see the obvious action taken by the staff to limit the Sashimi Salmon. Durian Goreng is good, but again, limited. I don't think it ran out due to popular demand. I saw that it was kept at the table behind the display. Common tim sum like prawn dumpling ran out early in the evening. Breakfast buffet is equally not impressive. Same behaviour by the staff, not to prepare sufficiently. I don't recommend to take up the buffet dinner/breakfast but only to stay with executive lounge would be sufficient.

sample_comments.title: No proper system
sample_comments.text: As much as I understand that it is a festive period, the hotel should anticipate and put in more manpower in manning the counters for check-in. Instead there is only 3 counters operating with 1 manned by the manager himself and 2 concierge staffs who have nothing much to do except pacing up and down the counters. This resulted in the check-in queue to form a 'snake' line. As much as the counter staff wants to facilitate and goes the 'extra mile' service to the tourist's queries, all irrelevant queries (eg. places to go, are the vicinity of the hotel, etc), these queries should be directed to the concierge to address not the counter staffs that caused longer waiting time for other tourists to check in. And I don't understand the hotel policy of the need to make a deposit when there is nt even a mini bar in the room. To ease the flow of traffic and convenience, the hotel should just include the deposit amount in the total price of stay or just remove the deposit like some other hotels (eg. St Giles). And you can't have the same queue as the check in tourist just to get back your deposit money! It just makes the queue longer and longer! You got to have 2 separate counters for check-in and check out. Probably not for normal days but esp need so during the festive period. In all honesty, was quite disappointed with the hotel given that it is by Hilton, our expectation were not met and the hotel did not live up to its reputation.

sample_comments.title: Short stay at DoubleTree
sample_comments.text: Stayed with my family of 4 here for 2 days 1 night. I arrived at 1.30pm. I have stayed twice in JB before and both hotels (different hotels) allowed early check in which was very helpful cos I have kids and bags and I prefer to leave them inside the room and then head out to spend the day. But for this hotel, I was told room wasn't ready or available yet and told a few times that check in is only at 3pm. We were at the lounge for more than an hour. My kids were getting restless and time was wasted by waiting when we could have gone out to do our activities and shopping etc. Finally we got the room and checked in. The room view faced the pool which was rather empty. The view was blocked by many buildings. For me that is okay. Cos I don't usually stay in the room as I spend the day outside and then come back to hotel to shower/ sleep. I tried to watch the TV at night. I noticed some Singapore TV channels the connection kept going off and coming back. I didn't experience this with other hotels. The pillows were flat and I had neck pain in the morning. The only good thing was we had two queen beds which was great for my family of 4. The other hotels I stayed at had only two single beds and we usually squeeze and sleep. But this queen beds are in the executive rooms. Another huge drawback in this hotel.. the shower room... The shower has a glass panel. Whoever is showering, the person in the room, can see them. That is the most uncomfortable thing I had to endure. I even asked the hotel if there is a curtain to pull down to cover the panel. I was told no. First time I had to experience this level of discomfort for a shower room. For this reason I may not come back to the hotel. Sorry.

The staff said that an upgrade is given to higher grade Hilton Honors member which was different from our experience at DoubleTree Hilton Malacca. Prior to us joining as member, the manager upgraded us without question. Thereafter, the staff gave us a room right at the end of the corridor nearest to where constructions of next buildings were. We were not given the welcome cookies which is a signature gesture of the hotel chain. No one came to help us with our luggage and stroller. We could hear construction sound during the day and night. sample_comments.title: Disappointing service.
sample_comments.text:
Overall my stay here was fine until my experience with the staff by the pool. I was looking forward to chill by the pool. I went down at about 2pm in the afternoon. I wanted to order some drinks but there was no staffs in sight so I went into the restaurant by the pool to order the drinks. An Indian male staff was on the phone by the counter when I requested to order the drink. 
I went ahead and ordered two drinks and went back to chill by the pool. I waited for more than 20 mins and the drinks was still not serve ( I was the ONLY person at the pool) After 30 mins, just as I wanted to cancel my order, that staff appear. What made it worse was shortly after he left. The strong winds by the pool blew the glasses to the ground. I barely had a sip! I went in again to tell him what happened. He came out to clear the mess and didnt return to replace the drinks! Just plain disappointing.

sample_comments.title: Not a 5 star hotel.
sample_comments.text:
I am quite surprise on how this hotel got so many positive review. It is a good hotel but to call it 5 star is overkill. At highest I can only give it 3 star. The only reason they call themselves 5 star are because it got Hilton name in it.

Car park (2 star)-

The car park are small. It is guarded by a guy who can't even speak Malay or English but generous in smile making communication really hard. And for a 5 star hotel, I am surprise the car park are not free. You need to pay RM 10 per night. BTW, don't use touch n go. They will charge you per hour rate. I pay a high sum of money to you and you can't even let go of the RM 10 park money. Really a dirty way to rip off our money.

Check in (2 star)-

The check-in is damn slow. I mean super slow for a "5" star hotel. It took us 20 minutes to check in and we are second in row. I also saw a couple foreigner going angry because they were in the hilton honors line but they have to take the same time as us to be treated. So what the purpose of being in your fancy hilton honor club if it is the same. But the good news is you got a warm cookies. Their signature trademark. The cookies are good. I mean really good. That is the only good thing about the hotel. 

They also promote us to enter the hilton honor club for free. They said the next time I want to book the hotel, I just need to call them directly, no need to use Agoda. You know why I book using Agoda, because I try calling them at the first place and they put me on-hold for almost 10 minute. Then they pick up just to put on another hold. It end up in a failure. I fed up and just book using Agoda. "5" star indeed.

Internet-
No wifi connection unless you are in the hilton honor club. Thats right, although you pay hefty sum of money for the night, you won't get any wifi connection. If you want, you need to pay for it. 

Services (4 star)-

Well I can't deny it, they smile all the time and try so hard to greet you. You can feel how fake it is. But thats

sample_comments.title: A 5 star said hotel that requires its guests to pay for parking
sample_comments.text:
I'm an annual visitor of DoubleTree Johor Bahru since 2 years ago. Each and every single time the registration is always late. 

This time I decided try out their suite. By the look of the room, the size, decor and amenities are good. However, surprisingly the mini bar is empty! No snacks no drinks. Only sachets of tea, coffee and sugar.

The iron was broken, the bathroom door was stuck. Newspapers are only offered when requested. Not quite a 5 star treatment expected for a suite guest. 

The worst part of all is having to pay for parking every single day I leave the hotel. Never have I come across a 5 star hotel that requires its guest to pay for the parking. RM10 per day okay. Not sure if it is per entrance though. Wasn't charged in 2014 or 2015. Anyways, future guests please be prepared. 

Overall, DoubleTree has either gone from bad to worse or hasn't improved much. I chose this hotel because of its reputation worldwide and also location. Hope they will improve.

sample_comments.title: One night in Johor

We arrived at 3.30pm and we were told that our room choice (king sized bed, non smoking floor) was unavailable. Instead we were offered a twin room on a smoking floor. I told the receptionist that it was everything I did NOT ask for. He then told me I would have to wait but could not tell me how long I'd have to wait for. He then offered me a twin bed on a non smoking floor, which I accepted as I had a function to attend that very evening and did not want to hang around waiting for an indefinite period. Guests usually form their first impression of any hotel from the point of check-in and as you can tell, mine was not a positive start. 

However, when we told the hotel manager this upon check out, he was most apologetic and offered to upgrade us the next time we stay with them.

Was completely taken off guard to find out I had to pay for Wifi, which I think is completely outdated. The client manager gave me "complimentarty" access and did a good job in settling me in. Bed was fine, but very early in the morning I wanted to take a shower only to find out the water went from boiling to icecold in seconds and back. I burnt my skin and was very happy my kid was not in that shower. When I went downstairs to check out and reported this, there was no apologies, no offer (to shower somewhere else maybe?) and when I told them this was a real problem they thanked me for my feedback. Not such a good experience....

sample_comments.title: Late Check In
sample_comments.text:
We booked a 2-bedroom suite with access to the executive lounge and requested an early check-in at 1 PM. However, due to various reasons, the hotel couldn't accommodate our request, which is understandable as it depends on availability.
What was unacceptable, though, was that our official check-in time was 3 PM, yet we didn't receive our room until 3:30 PM. The worst part was that I had arranged a birthday package to decorate the room as a surprise for my daughter. When we finally entered the room, the staff was still inside, tidying up and decorating. They only left at 3:40 PM.
I wouldn't have minded if this was a complimentary service, but I paid an extra 230 RM for it. The hotel did offer a 50 RM voucher, but that hardly made up for the inconvenience. I'm sharing this because I believe the hotel needs to improve its service---ruining a surprise for a loved one is disappointing.
This isn't an isolated incident either, as I've seen other reviews mentioning delayed check-ins. The hotel is strict about charging for early check-in and late check-out, so they should be just as diligent in ensuring rooms are ready on time. I understand that it's the school holiday season, but that's no excuse for lowering service standards. If the hotel can't handle the demand, they shouldn't accept more bookings than they can manage.

sample_comments.title: Bad experience
sample_comments.text:
Had a terrible experience at this hotel. Despite staying at this hotel many times through the years and several times this year only, it took the receptionist nearly half an hour to do my check in despite me arriving nearly 9pm. The person doing my check in was totally inept and inexperienced. I told him that I was experiencing gastric pains and that dinner was already included in my booking, he had to go in and out of the back office to keep checking instead of letting me go have my dinner first or even quickly doing my check in. He seemed more concerned about checking whether I'm entitled to what I claim I'm entitled to. I just don't understand, does he feel that I won't have money to pay even if ultimately he checked and things I claim I'm entitled to, are not?
I'm willing to give Doubletree another chance but it will certainly take a lot to make me come back to stay.
